text:
We built this experience alongside industry experts like you. Your insights mean everything to us. Share your feedback or contact us at {support_email} if you need assistance.

With gratitude,
The LUMAE.ai Team

© {dt.datetime.now().year} {company_name}. All rights reserved.

Terms of Service • Privacy Policy

""" return body_text, body_html def send_invite(email: str, code: str, *, dry_run: bool = False) -> bool: subject = build_email_subject() body_text, body_html = build_email_bodies(code) if dry_run: LOGGER.info("[DRY RUN] Would send %s -> %s", email, code) return True LOGGER.info("Sending beta invite to %s with code %s", email, code) success = send_acs_email( recipient=email, subject=subject, body_text=body_text, body_html=body_html, ) if success: LOGGER.info("Successfully sent invite to %s", email) else: LOGGER.error("send_acs_email reported failure for %s", email) return success def append_sent_records(path: Path, rows: List[Tuple[str, str]]): LOGGER.info("Appending %d new sent-records to %s", len(rows), path) file_exists = path.exists() with path.open("a", newline="", encoding="utf-8") as handle: fieldnames = ["email", "code", "sent_at"] writer = csv.DictWriter(handle, fieldnames=fieldnames) if not file_exists: LOGGER.info("Creating sent-records CSV with header: %s", path) writer.writeheader() timestamp = dt.datetime.utcnow().isoformat() for email, code in rows: writer.writerow({"email": email, "code": code, "sent_at": timestamp}) LOGGER.debug("Recorded %s -> %s at %s", email, code, timestamp) def parse_args(argv: Optional[Iterable[str]] = None) -> argparse.Namespace: parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Send beta invites to testers") parser.add_argument( "--dry-run", action="store_true", help="Preview the invites without sending email or updating beta_codes_sent.csv", ) parser.add_argument( "--limit", type=int, default=None, help="Optionally limit the number of testers processed", ) return parser.parse_args(argv) def main(argv: Optional[Iterable[str]] = None) -> int: args = parse_args(argv) logging.basicConfig( level=logging.INFO, format="%(asctime)s %(levelname)s %(name)s: %(message)s", stream=sys.stdout, force=True, ) LOGGER.setLevel(logging.INFO) LOGGER.info("Starting beta invite dispatch") LOGGER.info("Dry run mode: %s", args.dry_run) try: tester_emails = read_single_column_csv(TESTER_FILE) codes = read_single_column_csv(CODES_FILE) except FileNotFoundError as exc: LOGGER.error(str(exc)) return 1 if args.limit is not None: LOGGER.info("Limiting processing to the first %d testers", args.limit) tester_emails = tester_emails[: args.limit] LOGGER.info("Preparing assignments for %d testers", len(tester_emails)) sent_assignments, used_codes = load_sent_codes(SENT_FILE) try: assignments = reserve_codes(tester_emails, codes, sent_assignments, used_codes) except RuntimeError as exc: LOGGER.error(str(exc)) return 1 # Filter to only the records that are new (i.e., not previously recorded) new_assignments = [ (email, code) for email, code in assignments if sent_assignments.get(email.lower()) != code
